normalization.notes: Store modern Odia text in NFC and preserve reviewed source forms. Do not strip vowel signs, anusvara, candrabindu, virama, nukta, or subjoined conjunct signs during analysis.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: consonant bases, independent vowels, dependent vowel signs, inherent vowel, anusvara, virama, common conjuncts, and nukta-marked letters such as ଡ଼
segmentation.notes: Odia uses whitespace for coarse words but lessons need akshara-aware review. Rounded glyphs and below-base components require explicit font and segmentation checks.

sources.notes: Odia block metadata for letters, vowel signs, anusvara, virama, nukta, and digits.
